task_completion.description: Navigate to the WooCommerce Email Settings page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WordPress admin dashboard is visible, specifically showing the WooCommerce Settings page with the 'Emails' tab selected.
In the Emails list or the specific 'New order' settings page, the recipient field for 'New order' contains 'fulfillment@example.com'.
In the Emails list or the specific 'Cancelled order' settings page, the recipient field for 'Cancelled order' contains 'accounting@example.com'.
In the Emails list or the specific 'Failed order' settings page, the recipient field for 'Failed order' contains 'sysadmin@example.com'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the default admin address is removed from the modified notifications
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email address 'admin@example.com' is completely absent from the recipient fields for 'New order', 'Cancelled order', and 'Failed order'. This can be verified either on their individual settings pages or in the 'Recipients' column of the main Emails table.

integrity.description: Agent used the WordPress GUI to configure settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the WordPress/WooCommerce web interface in a browser, rather than terminal commands (like WP-CLI) or direct database manipulation.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The environment is a genuine web browser displaying the WordPress admin dashboard, not a text editor, local HTML file, or mocked interface.

There is a 'Your settings have been saved.' confirmation message, or the updated email addresses are visible in the main WooCommerce Emails table view after saving, rather than just being typed into unsaved input fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified email recipients: 'New order' must be fulfillment@example.com, 'Cancelled order' must be accounting@example.com, and 'Failed order' must be sysadmin@example.com. The default admin email (admin@example.com) must be removed from all three of these notification types.
